hotels.description_en:
Situated in the residential area of Arad, 2 km from the city centre, Pensiunea Select features air-conditioned rooms with a flat-screen TV and a balcony. Free WiFi is available in the entire property.

All rooms are decorated in dark furnishings and come with a private bathroom with a shower. They also include ironing facilities.

You can have breakfast during weekdays, or a drink at the bar. Table tennis facilities are offered, and you can relax in the garden.

The Select Pension is 2 km from the Fortress of Arad, and a 15-minute walk to the Neptun public swimming pool. Arad Central Railway Station and Arad International Airport are 3 and 11 km away respectively. Private parking is available for free.

Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip.
